source.name: GDACS — Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (UN OCHA / EC-JRC)
source.note: Openly-fetchable authoritative substitute; EM-DAT and ReliefWeb gate bulk data (login / approved appname). Alert level is a severity classification, not a casualty count — used as an INDEPENDENT outcome yardstick, never as a model input.
